feedback_files.tests/test_feedback.py:
import os

from file_tailer import FileTailer
from tail_checkpoint import CheckpointStore


def test_checkpoint_round_trips_source_provenance(tmp_path):
    store = CheckpointStore(tmp_path / "reader.cursor")

    store.save(14, (7, 31))

    saved = store.load()
    assert saved.offset == 14
    assert saved.source_id == (7, 31)


def test_replacement_file_is_read_from_start_after_process_restart(tmp_path):
    source = tmp_path / "worker.log"
    checkpoint = tmp_path / "worker.cursor"
    source.write_text("old-one\nold-two\n", encoding="utf-8")
    assert FileTailer(source, checkpoint).read_new() == ["old-one", "old-two"]

    replacement = tmp_path / "worker.next"
    replacement.write_text("new-one\nnew-two\n", encoding="utf-8")
    os.replace(replacement, source)

    restarted = FileTailer(source, checkpoint)
    assert restarted.read_new() == ["new-one", "new-two"]


def test_longer_replacement_does_not_skip_its_prefix(tmp_path):
    source = tmp_path / "events.log"
    checkpoint = tmp_path / "events.cursor"
    source.write_text("previous\n", encoding="utf-8")
    FileTailer(source, checkpoint).read_new()

    replacement = tmp_path / "events.replacement"
    replacement.write_text("replacement-a\nreplacement-b\n", encoding="utf-8")
    os.replace(replacement, source)

    assert FileTailer(source, checkpoint).read_new() == [
        "replacement-a",
        "replacement-b",
    ]
